name: Jagankumar E
title: Technical Lead, eGov Foundation
tagline: Full-stack engineer building scalable, configurable systems for digital governance across India.
bio: I'm a Technical Lead at eGov Foundation, working on CARE — an open-source health management information system used across public health deployments in India, including Jharkhand and Manipur.

My recent focus has been the radiology and tele-radiology stack: integrating DICOM modalities, DCM4CHEE, and the OHIF Viewer into CARE's plugin architecture, alongside pharmacy integrations (eAushadhi, DVDMS) and citizen grievance systems built on DIGIT PGR.
I also maintain CI/CD and infrastructure for the care-ecosystem org — multi-architecture Docker builds, a Superset analytics deployment on k3s, and GitOps-style delivery with ArgoCD.
